MINI MINUTES:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Amy C.Yi; Declaration Of Hans C. Ruschke
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Continued To Sep-29-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Judin, Esq., DEHAY ELLISTON LLP (510-285-0750), appearing for defendant / moving party Lehigh Hanson, Inc.
Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Steve Brinkman, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT LEHIGH HANSON, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

Hearing held and the Court ordered continued the hearing on defendant Lehigh Hanson, Inc.'s motions to quash service of summons in various cases. Plaintiffs' supplemental opposition is due on 9/20, defendant's supplemental reply due 9/27. Hearing is continued to September 29, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. Either party may request the transcript pursuant to Judge Sullivan's order re: confidentiality. Defendant has to obtain agreement with plaintiffs before adding new cases to this hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542 = (220/HEK)
